name: 90e30a77-45c5-47c2-8dec-cca193ac1644
description: Logs a progress note, win, or realization to the user's Evidence List.

category_tag.description: Optional. A brief category tag for the note, such as 'Financial', 'Mindset', or 'Habit'.

note_text.description: The actual text of the growth note, win, or realization the user wants to save to their Evidence List.

error.description: Optional. A human-readable message describing what went wrong if the operation failed.

status.description: Indicates the result of the operation. Returns a success string if the growth note was added.
